subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones! I behold Mine own Name, the Wronged One, and My loved ones in the prison of the land of Ṭá, inasmuch as they summoned the servants unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیائی اری اسمی المظلوم و اولیائی فی سجن ارض الطاء بما دعوا العباد الی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude
